message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor "main" as main
participant "bkup.BackupFacade" as BackupFacade
participant "srcrepo.SourceRepository" as SourceRepo
participant "dstrepo.DestinationRepository" as DestRepo
participant "metarepo.MetadataRepository" as MetadataRepo
participant "scanner.AllFileScanner" as Scanner
database "FileSystem" as FileSystem
database "SQLite3" as SQLite3

main -> BackupFacade: execute()

rectangle "Get all files" {
  BackupFacade -> Scanner: get_all_files()
  Scanner --> FileSystem
  FileSystem --> Scanner
  Scanner --> BackupFacade: all_files
}

rectangle "Get source files" {
  BackupFacade -> SourceRepo: get_files_matching_criteria(all_files)
  SourceRepo --> BackupFacade: src_files
}

rectangle "Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files" {
  BackupFacade -> MetadataRepo: get_uncontained_keys(src_files)
  MetadataRepo -> SQLite3: SELECT
  SQLite3 --> MetadataRepo: result
  MetadataRepo --> BackupFacade: uncontained_keys
  BackupFacade -> MetadataRepo: remove_metadatas(uncontained_keys)
  
  loop [until the generator finishes]
    MetadataRepo -> SQLite3: DELETE
    SQLite3 --> MetadataRepo
    MetadataRepo --> BackupFacade: yield removed_metadata <return value is discarded>
  end
}

rectangle "Create backup and update metadata" {
  BackupFacade -> BackupFacade: _get_backup_list(src_files)
  BackupFacade --> BackupFacade: backup_list
  BackupFacade -> DestRepo: create_backups(backup_list)
  
  loop [until the generator finishes]
    DestRepo -> FileSystem: shutil.copy2(src_file, dst_file)
    FileSystem --> DestRepo
    DestRepo --> BackupFacade: yield backed_up_src_file
    BackupFacade -> MetadataRepo: update_metadata(backed_up_src_file)
    MetadataRepo -> SQLite3: REPLACE INTO
    SQLite3 --> MetadataRepo
  end
}

rectangle "Discard old backups" {
  BackupFacade -> DestRepo: get_discard_list(today, all_files)
  DestRepo --> BackupFacade: discard_list
  BackupFacade -> DestRepo: remove_backups(discard_list)
  
  loop [until the generator finishes]
    DestRepo -> FileSystem: os.remove(file_to_be_removed)
    FileSystem --> DestRepo
    DestRepo --> BackupFacade: yield removed_file <return value is discarded>
  end
}

BackupFacade --> main: return

@enduml
